sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The right control bars show a different pattern:
- Row 33: WWwwwWWwwwWWwwwWWwwwW
- Row 35: WWWwWWWWwWWWWwWWWWwWW
- Row 39: WWwwwWWwwwWWwwwWWwwwW
- Row 41: WWWwWWWWwWWWWwWWWWwWW
- Row 45: WWwwwWWwwwWWwwwWWwwwW
- Row 47: WWWwWWWWwWWWWwWWWWwWW
These are alternating patterns with W (white) and w (light gray). The right control bars are on a white background, so W would blend in and w would be visible.
Looking at the pattern more carefully:
- Row 33: WW www WW www WW www WW www W (alternating 2W and 3w)
- Row 35: WWW w WWWW w WWWW w WWWW w WW (alternating 3W, 1w, 4W, 1w...)
Wait, this doesn't look right. Let me re-examine. The right control bars seem to have a different structure than the left ones.
Actually, looking at the left control bars again:
- Row 33: gBBBggBBBggBBBggBBB (black bars on gray background)
- Rows 35-37: ggwggggwggggwggggwg (single gray bars on gray background)
- Row 39: gwwwggwwwggwwwggwww (triple gray bars on gray background)
- Rows 41-43: ggwggggwggggwggggwg (single gray bars)
- Row 45: gwwwggwwwggwwwggwww (triple gray bars)
- Rows 47-49: ggBggggBggggBggggBg (black bars - toggled by right panel)
The right control bars on white background:
- Row 33: WWwwwWWwwwWWwwwWWwwwW
- Row 35: WWWwWWWWwWWWWwWWWWwWW
- etc.
Hmm, the right control bars seem to have a different pattern. Let me think about what the goal might be.
In level 1, the goal was to make all control bars black. In level 2, maybe the goal is similar but with two sets of control bars.
But wait - the right control bars use W and w colors, not B and w. So they can't be toggled to black like the left ones.
Let me reconsider the game mechanics. Maybe:
1. The left panel controls the left side (dark square position + left control bars)
2. The right panel controls the right side (yellow shapes position + right control bars)
3. The goal is to match some target configuration
Looking at the small panels at the bottom:
- Left panel (blue border): yellow dots at cols 8-9, white dots at cols 11, 13
- Right panel (gray border): yellow square at cols 19-21, white dot at col 21
The yellow markers in the panels seem to indicate the "target" positions for the objects. The white dots might indicate additional target positions or something else.
Actually, let me reconsider. The panels might be "buttons" that toggle between states, and the goal is to get the control bars into a specific configuration.
Let me try clicking on the right control bars to see if they can be toggled like in level 1.

</parameter>
